mapper.sql: A.IMAGE_ID AS imageId , A.IMAGE_NM AS imageNm , A.IMAGE AS image , A.IMAGE_FILE AS imageFile , A.IMAGE_DC AS imageDc , A.REFLCT_AT AS reflctAt , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS userId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_LOGIN_SCRIN_IMAGE A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LOGIN_SCRIN_IMAGE A WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM TB_LOGIN_SCRIN_IMAGE A WHERE A.REFLCT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
